results.rendered_html:
ativṛddha a. Very old; very much grown.
— ddhaḥ N. of a Mantra in Tantras; catuḥśataṃ samārabhya yāvadvarṇasahasrakam . ativṛddhaḥ sa maṃtrastu sarvaśāstreṣu varjitaḥ ..
— ddhā A very old cow (unable to chew grass &c.).
